---
title: "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density"
output:
  github_document: default
---

```{r setup-and-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggrepel) 
library(SternBrocotPhysics)

# --- 1. Configuration & Data Load ---
dir_base_data_4TB <- "/Volumes/SanDisk4TB/SternBrocot-data"

dir_01_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "01_harmonic_oscillator_erasures")
dir_02_densities    <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "02_harmonic_oscillator_densities")
dir_03_nodes        <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "03_harmonic_oscillator_nodes")
dir_04_summary      <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "04_harmonic_oscillator_summary")

file_summary  <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_erasure_displacement_summary.csv.gz")
file_seq_len  <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_sequence_length_summary.csv.gz")
file_res_marg <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_resonance_margin_summary.csv.gz")

dt_summary_erasure_displacement <- if (file.exists(file_summary)) fread(file_summary) else data.table()
dt_summary_sequence_length      <- if (file.exists(file_seq_len)) fread(file_seq_len) else data.table()
dt_summary_resonance_margin     <- if (file.exists(file_res_marg)) fread(file_res_marg) else data.table()

# --- 1.5 Physics Constants & Action Mapping ---
if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_displacement)>0) dt_summary_erasure_displacement[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_sequence_length)>0) dt_summary_sequence_length[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]
if(nrow(dt_summary_resonance_margin)>0) dt_summary_resonance_margin[, action_A := normalized_momentum^2]

# --- 2. DATA SELECTION FOR GRID ---
target_a_ratios <- c(1, 3.14, 4.14, 5.5, 8.0, 9.0, 35.0)

dt_selected_custom <- rbindlist(lapply(target_a_ratios, function(target_ratio) {
  target_p <- sqrt(target_ratio)
  dt_summary_erasure_displacement[which.min(abs(normalized_momentum - target_p))]
}))

dynamic_height_custom <- max(5, nrow(dt_selected_custom) * 4.0 + 1)
```

```{r plot-2A-overview-scatter-erasure-displacement, echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# --- Plot 2A: Overview Scatter Plot ---
if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_displacement) > 0) {
  p_nodes <- plot_erasure_nodes(
    dt_summary = dt_summary_erasure_displacement,
    max_action = 50,
    style = "readme"
  )
  print(p_nodes)
}
```

```{r plot-1A-grid-parabola, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=dynamic_height_custom, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Plot 1A: Shared Plotting Engine (Readme Style) ---
p_grid <- plot_erasure_grid(
  dt_meta = dt_selected_custom, 
  dir_raw = dir_01_raw_erasures, 
  dir_densities = dir_02_densities, 
  dir_nodes = dir_03_nodes,
  style = "readme",
  base_font = "",
  overarching_title = "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density (Linear Action Fit)"
)
print(p_grid)
```

```{r plot-3-sequence-length-evolution, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 3: Sequence Length Summary ---
if (nrow(dt_summary_sequence_length) > 0) {
  ggplot(dt_summary_sequence_length[action_A <= 105], aes(x = action_A)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = min_len, ymax = max_len, fill = "Absolute Range"), alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = "±1 SD"), alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "Variance", values = c("Absolute Range" = "grey90", "±1 SD" = "grey70")) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_len, color = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.0) +
    geom_step(aes(y = median_len, color = "Median"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "gray30", "Median" = "black")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, by = 10)) +
    labs(title = "Thermodynamic Complexity vs Action", x = "Action (A)", y = "Sequence Length (N bits)") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}
```

```{r plot_tree, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=8, dpi=300}
# --- Plot 4: Stern-Brocot Tree Plot ---
p_tree <- plot_erasure_tree(
  max_N = 4, 
  q_bin = "110", 
  q_num = 3,
  q_den = 2,
  q_target = (sqrt(5)+1)/2,
  style = "readme",
  base_font = "",
  mono_font = ""
)
print(p_tree)
```
